article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: Severe attribution violations: key_indicators (and much of the reasoning) rely on the letter-writer’s words rather than the author/editor’s prose, violating the attribution rule. Output formatting also used markdown fences, not plain JSON. Classification direction (Right) is plausible given platforming choices and lack of counterbalance, and confidence is roughly appropriate.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Labeling as Right matches the clear pro-Trump, interventionist perspective the outlet chose to platform without counterbalance; direction is correct.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.92 is reasonable for a clearly one-sided, unbalanced presentation.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Indicators are drawn from the source’s first-person letter (not the author’s prose), which the rules forbid; minimal reliance on the editor’s framing (headline, brief attribution line).
